description: Phase 3 - Backend Serverless with Lambda + API Gateway + DynamoDB: Create the backend API infrastructure and Lambda function code for persisting user progress, managing rankings, and syncing data. Uses API Gateway HTTP API (lower cost than REST API), Lambda (Free Tier: 1M requests/month, 400,000 GB-seconds), and DynamoDB (Free Tier: 25GB, 25 WCU, 25 RCU).
steps: Create lib/backend-stack.ts in infra/ with: DynamoDB table 'KiroQuestUsers' (PK: userId, SK for different record types - progress, results, rankings), API Gateway HTTP API with Cognito JWT authorizer, Lambda functions (Node.js 20 runtime) for CRUD operations, proper IAM roles (least privilege)
Create backend/ directory at project root with Lambda function code in TypeScript: backend/src/handlers/ with saveProgress.ts, getProgress.ts, submitResult.ts, getRankings.ts, getProfile.ts

Create backend/src/models/ with DynamoDB access patterns: UserProgress (PK=USER#userId, SK=PROGRESS#stageId), StageResult (PK=USER#userId, SK=RESULT#stageId), Ranking (PK=RANKING#stageId, SK=SCORE#timestamp#userId for leaderboard queries)
Create backend/package.json with dependencies: @aws-sdk/client-dynamodb, @aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb, and build configuration using esbuild for Lambda bundling
Create backend/tsconfig.json configured for Node.js 20 Lambda runtime
Add API endpoint outputs (API Gateway URL) to CDK stack for frontend configuration
Create src/services/api.ts in frontend with typed API client that calls the backend endpoints (with auth token in Authorization header)
Update src/progress/progressTracker.ts to add a new CloudProgressTracker that syncs with the backend API when user is authenticated (falls back to localStorage for anonymous users)
Update src/stores/quizStore.ts _persist() method to call CloudProgressTracker when authenticated
acceptance_criteria: CDK backend stack synthesizes valid CloudFormation with DynamoDB table, API Gateway, and Lambda functions
Lambda handler code compiles with TypeScript and has proper type definitions
DynamoDB access patterns support: save/get progress per user per stage, submit/get results, get rankings
Frontend API client handles authenticated and unauthenticated flows gracefully
progressTracker now has dual-mode: localStorage (anonymous) and API (authenticated)
All existing tests pass without modification
New backend handlers have unit tests
verification: cd infra && npx tsc --noEmit && npx cdk synth --quiet
cd backend && npm install && npx tsc --noEmit
findings: All backend handler tests pass (20 tests). CDK synth succeeds with a deprecation warning for pointInTimeRecovery (non-blocking). Frontend typecheck passes. The pre-existing test failure in src/data/__tests__/questionStore.test.ts (getQuestionById) remains unchanged and is unrelated to this feature. Backend npm install brings in 161 packages. The vitest config in backend runs via the root project test command since vitest auto-discovers test files.
